name: Doximity, Inc.
description: Doximity Inc provides an online platform, which enables physicians and other healthcare professionals to collaborate with colleagues, stay up to date with the latest medical news and research, manage their careers and on-call schedules, streamline documentation and administrative paperwork, and conduct virtual patient visits. The Company's customers include pharmaceutical companies and health systems that connect with healthcare professionals through the Company's digital Marketing, Hiring, and Workflow Solutions. Marketing Solutions provide customers with the ability to share tailored content on the network. Hiring Solutions enable customers to identify, connect with, and hire from the network of both active and passive potential medical professional candidates.
